name: agent_task_data_clear
description: Clear task-specific data from agent memory with optional filtering. Use this to clean up old or irrelevant data, or when a task is completed and the stored data is no longer needed.

task_id.description: The task ID to clear data for. Must match the current task.

data_key.description: Specific data key to clear (optional). If not provided, clears all data for the task.

data_type.description: Clear only data of this type (optional). If not provided, clears all types.

priority.description: Clear only data of this priority (optional). If not provided, clears all priorities.

step_filter.description: Clear only data from this step (optional). If not provided, clears data from all steps.

confirmation.description: Must be true to confirm data clearing operation. This prevents accidental data loss.

reason.description: Reason for clearing the data (optional). Will be logged for audit purposes.
